android_dp58_nguyenvuphuong Info Fragment Name: Nguyen Vu Phuong Student ID: ADR58_D2 Class: Android Basic Email: vphuong4725@gmail.com" Action Fragment Call Email Main Activity Profile Back Info Action Description ☰ ✎ ⋯ ⌕ 📷 Nguyễn Phương 167 followers · 706 following · 16 posts Friends with things in common I love ICTU ▣ Digital creator · 📍 Thái Nguyên · 🎓 Trường Đại học Công nghệ thông tin & Truyền thông, Thái Nguyên ▣ Dashboard ▣ Create reel All Reels Photos Events Personal details ✎ 📍 Thái Nguyên ⌂ Thái Nguyên ▭ July 18, 1950 " See more details" Education ✎ Trường Đại học Công nghệ thông tin & Truyền thông, Thái Nguyên ⌂ Home ▣ Reels ▤ Marketplace ⊙ Games ♢ Notifications ● Profile Detail Free Wifi Free Breakfast 5.0 Decription Aston Hotel, Alice Springs NT 0870, Australia is a modern hotel, elegant 5 star hotel overlooking the sea, perfect for a romantic, charming and relaxing vacation with family and friends. The hotel offers luxury rooms, free high speed wifi, delicious breakfast, beautiful sea views and excellent customer service. Guests can enjoy the peaceful atmosphere, outdoor swimming pool and many exciting activities nearby. Collapse
